name: Christian Pemberton
text: What's up everyone, I'm Christian, and I am a first year studying Business admin with a concentration in fintech. I'm from the Worcester county area, but grew up in Maryland. I was in Greece in the fall, and it was such an amazing experience. I've always been interested in the stock market and trading, so I will be exploring the IFC track. I spend a lot of my time playing volleyball, weightlifting, and hanging out with friends. I used to play a lot of video games, but I haven't had much time to do so anymore sadly. I enjoy watching anime (so close to being caught up with op and currently am watching the jjk eps as they drop), listening to music (literally anything but country, but listen to a lot of ug rap) and cooking. My favorite season is summer, and during that time I play pickleball almost everyday with my brother. I also have a Doberman named valentina. Anyways I'm super excited for this weekends retreat and our first game night! Always love connecting with people so don't be afraid to reach out!

name: Madison Gillespie
text: Hi everyone! My name is Madison Gillespie (Maddy or Madison is good), and I am from Wilton, CT. I am a second-year studying International Business with a concentration in marketing analytics and a minor in international affairs. I want to join consulting and possibly the Investment Fund in the future. I am super excited to meet everyone :) Outside of school, I love to run, especially in Boston. This past fall, I ran the Cambridge half-marathon. I also love to try different workout classes with my friends. I love fashion, and have a part-time job at Aritzia in the Pru. My favorite TV show is Friends, and I could probably cite any episode just by hearing the first few seconds play. I also love SATC, Suits, and The Devil Wears Prada. I love listening to music as well. I love SZA, Taylor Swift, Lana Del Ray, Dom Dolla, and Rihanna. I enjoy going to concerts, and I flew to London to see the Eras tour last summer!

name: Rio Quinn
text: Hello Everyone! My name is Rio Quinn and I am a first-year student studying math and business. I am from Millbrook, NY which is a tiny town in the middle of the woods about an hour north of Weschester. During the fall, I was part of the N.U.in Rome program and I had a super amazing experience there. I am interested in joining the Tech Consulting track as it blends my interests of business and STEM so I am looking forward to TCF. Outside of school, I love to stay active. I go to the gym a lot to lift weights and run. I enjoy hiking, and I have climbed almost every mountain in the Tetons in Wyoming so ask me about that if you are interested. Skiing is also a passion of mine, and my favorite places to ski in NY are Catamount and Hunter mountain. I also love playing sports, and in high school I played soccer, hockey, and lacrosse. I am really excited to be a part of TAMID and I can't wait to meet everybody!

name: Sebastian Lutz
text: Hi everyone my name is Sebastian I am a first year student studying economics and psychology. I did my first semester abroad in Berlin and traveled to Morocco, Munich, Vienna, and Prague. I am originally from Moscow Russia, and have 5 siblings, but my family moved to Abu Dhabi two years ago. I am a big traveler and have been all over Europe part of eastern Asian, Africa, and both US coasts. Beyond traveling I grew up playing chess, boxing, soccer, swimming, and wrestling. I love to read books from a variety of genres both fiction and non fiction. Similarly I have a broad music taste ranging from drake, luminaries, the smiths, cigarette after sex, the weekend and many more. I am a big movie and tv show fan and have an extensive list of great movies or shows; some of my favorites are Shawshank redemption, game of thrones, fight club, dead poet society, and more. I am really excited to meet everyone in person and hear some of the incredible stories you all have.

name: Gahan Patel
text: Hey everyone, my name is Gahan, and I am a 2nd year studying Computer Science and Business Administration. I am from New Orleans, Louisiana and I was in the Oakland campus for my first year. I am looking forward to TCF and joining the Tech Consulting track after. In my free time, I love playing basketball, working out, watching shows, and listening to a lot of music. Some of my favorite artists are Drake (my :goat:), The Weeknd, and SZA. I definitely want to go to more concerts in the future as I have only been to one so far. I also listen to a lot of Hindi music (Arijit Singh is my second :goat:). Some of my favorite shows I have watched are How I Met Your Mother, Suits, and Breaking Bad. I also love Indian and Mexican food, so if anyone has any recommendations lmk. I am honestly very excited to be a part of TAMID and cant wait to get to know everyone!
